sign_in_to_start: Sign in to Start Your Session
placeholder_body: This page will be ported from the legacy system in a later PR. Click another menu item to continue.
session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
note_required: A note is required for differences above {{limit}}
diff_exceeds_limit: Difference exceeds threshold ({{limit}} kr or 5%) — please provide an explanation.
slot_provider_not_configured: No slot provider configured for this hall
close_day_irreversible: This action cannot be undone. The shift will be closed.

number_of_minimum_tickets_to_start_the_G: Number of Minimum Tickets to Start the Game
search_by_username_email_phone: Search by username, email or phone
csv_export_too_many: Too many rows for CSV export
soft_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the player? This can be restored later.
restore_confirm: Are you sure you want to restore the player?
resubmit_kyc_confirm_text: The player will be reset to UNVERIFIED and can resubmit KYC documents.
bankid_reverify_confirm_text: This resets the KYC status and starts a new BankID session for the player.
bankid_session_opened: BankID session opened in a new window
bankid_not_configured_mock_mode: BankID is not configured in this environment — mock mode active
bankid_not_configured_banner: BankID adapter is not configured. This page is running in mock mode. Sessions will not complete against a real BankID provider until BANKID_CLIENT_ID/SECRET/REDIRECT_URI are set.
bankid_verify_instructions: The player should complete BankID in the frame below. Do not close the window until the process is complete.
bankid_verify_missing_session: No BankID session provided in URL. Start reverification from the player profile.
bankid_response_success_text: The player has completed the BankID session.
bankid_response_error_text: The BankID session did not complete. Try again or contact support.
bankid_response_pending_text: The BankID session result is not ready yet.
track_spending_banner_body: Aggregate endpoint is not yet available. Data cannot be displayed (BIN-628). The page shows no data because fail-closed applies to regulatory Spillvett tracking.
login_history_pending_banner: Login history requires a dedicated backend endpoint (BIN-629). Coming in a later release.
chips_history_pending_banner: Chips history requires a dedicated backend endpoint (BIN-630). Coming in a later release.
no_hall_status: No hall status assigned to player.
generate_confirm_body: This creates the ticket rows in the database. The action cannot be reversed once tickets are used.
confirm_delete_batch_body: This action cannot be reversed. Sold tickets remain in the history.
non_sequential_warning_body: Start ID does not follow immediately after the last registered ID. Continue anyway?
scope_dropped_cashout_body: Per-game aggregate of physical cashout across days requires backend endpoints that are not yet delivered.
scope_dropped_game_ticket_list_body: Per-game sold ticket list with bingo verification and reward flow requires backend endpoints that are not yet delivered.
unique_id_scope_dropped_body: Anonymous Unique Player cards (9-digit random ID without player linkage) are out of scope for the pilot. See BIN-583 for history.
hall_scope_required: Select a hall to load batches
